subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-07-28 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Profitless discussions fatigue and weary a person. People who call on me almost every day carry on a stream of profitless, unspiritual talk.... Man's speech is the revealer of his heart…. There are persons with whom we associate and converse whose utterances are life-imparting
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
